title: EWABusinessResult
description: Structured output from the Business specialist agent. Reporting-first model: every assigned business chapter produces at least one observation, whether clean or flagged. RAG status is captured when available from EWA flags; narrative quality summaries are used otherwise.

applicable.description: True when the analyzed system is SAP ECC or SAP S/4HANA (i.e., has business process chapters). False when the EWA belongs to a non-ECC/S4 system (BW, SolMan, Gateway, etc.) — in which case findings must be empty.

findings.description: Business observations — one entry per business topic area. Every assigned section must produce at least one observation, including clean areas. Leave empty only when applicable=false.

source_chapter.description: Chapter and subsection where this observation originates.

title.description: Short descriptive title for this topic area (e.g. 'DVM Housekeeping Status', 'Financial Reconciliation').

rag_status.description: RAG status: GREEN=no issues, YELLOW=warning/attention needed, RED=critical issue. Set to null only when the EWA provides no RAG flag for this topic and a narrative quality summary is used instead.

finding.description: The observed state of this business area — what was found, whether clean or problematic. For clean areas, summarize the positive status (e.g., 'No overdue items reported. DVM volumes are within recommended thresholds.').

impact.description: Business significance of this observation. For clean items, note what this means for operational health (e.g., 'Data volumes are manageable; no archiving urgency.'). For flagged items, state the business risk.

recommendation.description: Required action, if any. Set to null for GREEN observations with no action needed. For YELLOW/RED, quote or closely paraphrase the SAP advisory.

parameters.description: Configuration parameters with an explicit SAP-recommended value change.

param_name.description: Name of the SAP parameter or configuration item.

current_value.description: Current value as reported in the EWA.

recommended_value.description: SAP-recommended value as stated in the report.

abstentions.description: Only used when applicable=false. A single entry with reason not_applicable_system_type to signal the entire business pillar is not relevant for this system.
